title: Anemcoro

'''Anemcoro''' was a colony [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Anemcoro system/Legends|Anemcoro system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Albarrio sector/Legends|Albarrio sector]].

==History==
Discovered sometime after the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="TEA" /> Anemcoro was colonized by the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] from [[Moltok/Legends|Moltok]].

After the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the world suffered a war in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]] with fighting erupting between two races from neighboring planets. A supposedly accidental Imperial [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] attack destroyed many cities and caused a vast firestorm which desolated the planet's terra-scaped surface. Few Ho'Din escaped, but one escapee was [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]], whose rare plants he had tended on the planet were destroyed.<ref name="ND" />

After the devastation of Anemcoro, the world was annexed as part of [[Oversector Outer]] and, following the death of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], eventually formed into the [[Pentastar Alignment]]. [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] brought the world into his [[Imperial Remnant]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Anemcoro was created for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] sourcebook [[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']], published in [[1997]]. Its system was later charted on a map of the [[Pentastar Alignment]] in the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
